calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Jul-14-2017 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Evyn Shomer for San Francisco Public Administrator (Petitioner).
Kenny Williams (Son of Decedent) also present.

The Court noted that Ms. Davis was not present and that no Attorney was present on her behalf. The Court granted the First and Final Account and Report of Administrator, etc. (subject to review of the order).

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: M. Nuque. Not reported.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Jun-05-2017 Continued To Jul-10-17 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Evyn Shomer for San Francisco Public Administrator.
Kenny Williams (Son of Decedent) in Propria Persona.
Flora Davis (Objector) in Propria Persona.

Ms. Davis requested a continuance to hire an Attorney stating that she initially did not have enough money to pay an attorney, that she received legal advise from the JVC Legal Advise and Referral Clinic, that they are looking for an attorney for her and that she has been paying the mortgage. Mr. Williams stated that the house is a single family dwelling, that they both still live in the home and that he plans to keep it. Ms. Shomer provided a summary, stated that it has been determined that Kenny is the sole heir and is entitled to receive transfer of the home, that she has provided Kenny with referrals to get assistance, and that Kenny has negotiated with the Department of Health Care Services and the Public Administrator. Ms. Shomer also stated that the Public Administrator wants to go forward with distribution, that there is a small mortgage and that they received notice that the mortgage is in arears. Mr. Williams stated that he wants this to be resolved. The First and Final Account and Report of Administrator, etc. is continued to July 10, 2017 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 with the understanding that if no proposed motions are before the Court, the petition will be granted.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Court Examiner: Sandy Hilton. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: A. Jaime. Not reported.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Mar-27-2017 Continued To Jun-05-17 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Evon Shomer for San Francisco Public Administrator.
Kenneth Williams (Son of Decedent) in Propria Persona.

Ms. Shomer stated that she has not seen the document that was submitted by Ms. Davis, that she filed an amendment last week, that Mr. Williams signed a voluntary lien agreement with the Department of Aging and Adult Services, and the Department of Health Care Services ("DHS"), that the document was notarized and sent to DHS, that Mr. Williams' payment to DHS was re-negotiated to $100.00 a month and that the 7% interest rate is not negotiable. Ms. Shomer also stated that the DHS agreement requires that payment becomes due if the house is sold or Mr. Williams defaults, that the PG's agreement does not include a requirement for monthly payments or interest, and that she believes there is an outstanding notice. Mr. Williams stated that he and Ms. Davis are living in the property, and that he has not spoken with Ms. Davis as to what is going to happen to her if the house gets sold. The accounting petition is continued to June 5, 2017 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Court Examiner: Sandy Hilton. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: A. Jaime. Not reported.
